title: Foundation-model comparison on the focal tasks. Top: frozen DNABERT-2 and Caduceus-Ph official AUROC and reverse-complement instability. Bottom: completed interventions on the same models. Temperature scaling improves calibration, whereas matched-negative-trained heads alter matched-test AUROC and sometimes trade off official performance for confounder-controlled robustness.
notes: Long-form mitigation summary for focal DNABERT-2 and Caduceus-Ph rows.
